whats_new.title: Oracle GoldenGate for Sybase supports Microservices Architecture
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate for Sybase now supports Microservices Architecture.

whats_new.title: Support for MySQL Releases 9.0 and 8.4
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate for MySQL now supports releases 9.0 and 8.4.

whats_new.title: Support for VECTOR datatype in Oracle GoldenGate for MySQL
whats_new.description: Oracle GoldenGate (23.5 onwards) for MySQL 9.0 and higher supports the vector data type.
